name: Black Seed Oil
summary: Black Seed Oil is tracked for Nigella sativa oil contains thymoquinone with antioxidant and metabolic pathway effects with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
description: Black Seed Oil is tracked for Nigella sativa oil contains thymoquinone with antioxidant and metabolic pathway effects with conservative evidence framing. Treat dosing and outcomes as review-gated unless PMID-backed human evidence is present.
safetyNotes: Generally well tolerated for most users.
contraindications: anticoagulant or antiplatelet medication due to enhanced bleeding risk
antihypertensive medication due to additive blood pressure lowering effect
immunosuppressant medication due to reduced effectiveness from immune-stimulating activity
bupropion or other CYP450-metabolized medications due to altered drug levels from enzyme interaction
pregnancy due to insufficient safety data
discontinue before scheduled surgery due to bleeding risk
